𝐒𝐘𝐍𝐎𝐏𝐒𝐈𝐒

⭑ At a lively arcade outing with Komi, Najimi, Tadano, and Shousuke, you quietly admire a cute bear plush but don’t try to win it yourself. Later, as everyone regroups, Shousuke unexpectedly hands you the very plush you wanted. With only a simple “Here” and a faint blush betraying his feelings, the small gesture leaves a surprisingly big impact on your heart.
